explanations.14: The property declaration uses a fully qualified class name (Behat\Mink\Mink) even though Mink was already imported at the top; you can simplify this to just 'Mink $mink'.
explanations.29: The third argument 'http://0.0.0.0:9222' is the address where the Chrome browser automation tool is listening for commands, not the website being tested.
explanations.43: The 'is_dir' function checks if a directory already exists before creating it, so the code doesn't fail if '.output' was already made by a previous test run.
explanations.53: The 'findAll' method searches the page for every HTML element matching the CSS selector and returns them as an array, which you then loop through to find the right one.
explanations.59: The 'getText()' method extracts the human-readable text content from an HTML element (like 'Blog' from a link), which is compared to the menu parameter passed into the function.
